scripts.build: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator python -m compileall src
scripts.lint: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator python -m compileall src
scripts.test: UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.uv-cache uv run --package elephant-calculator python -c "from elephant_calculator.cli import main; print(callable(main))"
